Part.Source:
Event Start
TblTOTPAuthenticator.Visible = FAlse If &Mode = TrnMode.Insert &Name.Enabled = True Else &Name.Enabled = False &FunctionId = GAMAuthenticationFunctions.OnlyAuthentication Endif
Do Case Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Apple Do "InitAuthenticationTypeApple"
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Custom Do "InitAuthenticationTypeCustom"
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.ExternalWebService Do "InitAuthenticationTypeExternalWebService"
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Facebook Do "InitAuthenticationTypeFacebook"
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMLocal Do "InitAuthenticationTypeGAMLocal"
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote Do "InitAuthenticationTypeGAMRemote"
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest Do "InitAuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest"
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Google Do "InitAuthenticationTypeGoogle"
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.OTP Do "InitAuthenticationTypeOTP"
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Twitter Do "InitAuthenticationTypeTwitter"
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.WeChat Do "InitAuthenticationTypeWeChat"
EndCase
If &Mode = TrnMode.Display BtnEnter.Visible = False &FunctionId.Enabled = True Endif If &Mode = TrnMode.Display or &Mode = TrnMode.Delete BtnGenKey.Visible = False BtnGenKeyCustom.Visible = False &FunctionId.Enabled = False &IsEnable.Enabled = False &Dsc.Enabled = False &SmallImageName.Enabled = False &BigImageName.Enabled = False &Impersonate.Enabled = False &WSVersion.Enabled = False &WSPrivateEncryptKey.Enabled = False &WSServerName.Enabled = False &WSServerPort.Enabled = False &WSServerBaseURL.Enabled = False &WSServerSecureProtocol.Enabled = False &WSTimeout.Enabled = False &WSPackage.Enabled = False &WSName.Enabled = False &WSExtension.Enabled = False &ClientId.Enabled = False &ClientSecret.Enabled = False &VersionPath.Enabled = False &SiteURL.Enabled = False &SiteURLCallbackIsCustom.Enabled= False &ConsumerKey.Enabled = False &ConsumerSecret.Enabled = False &CallbackURL.Enabled = False &CusVersion.Enabled = False &CusPrivateEncryptKey.Enabled = False &CusFileName.Enabled = False &CusPackage.Enabled = False &CusClassName.Enabled = False &AddUserAdditionalDataScope.Enabled = False &AddInitialPropertiesScope.Enabled = False &AdditionalScope.Enabled = False &GAMRAuthenticationTypeName.Enabled = False &GAMRServerURL.Enabled = False &GAMRPrivateEncryptKey.Enabled = False &GAMRRepositoryGUID.Enabled = False &AutovalidateExternalTokenAndRefresh.Enabled = False
// OTP and TFA properties &OTPUseForFirstFactorAuthentication.Enabled = False &TFAEnable.Enabled = False &TFAAuthenticationTypeName.Enabled = False &TFAFirstFactorAuthenticationExpiration.Enabled = False &TFAForceForAllUsers.Enabled = False &OTPEventValidateUser.Enabled = False &OTPGenerationType.Enabled = False &OTPGenerationType_CustomEventGenerateCode.Enabled = False &OTPGEnerationType_TOTPAuthenticatorIssuer.Enabled = False &OTPGenerationType_TOTPAuthenticatorSecretKey.Enabled = False &OTPCodeExpirationTimeout.Enabled = False &OTPMaximumDailyNumberCodes.Enabled = False &OTPAutogeneratedCodeLength.Enabled = False &OTPGenerateCodeOnlyNumbers.Enabled = False &OTPNumberUnsuccessfulRetriesToLockOTP.Enabled = False &OTPNumberUnsuccessfulRetriesToBlockUserBasedOfOTPLocks.Enabled = False &OTPAutoUnlockTime.Enabled = False &OTPEventSendCode.Enabled = False &OTPMailMessageSubject.Enabled = False &OTPMailMessageBodyHTML.Enabled = False &OTPEventValidateCode.Enabled = False //////////////////
BtnEnter.Caption = "WWP_GAM_Delete" Endif Do "RefreshAuthenticationType"
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//Code block: EditFormClass LayoutMainTable.Class = LayoutMainTable.Class + " " + ThemeClass:EditForm
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoGenKeyCustom'
&CusPrivateEncryptKey = GetEncryptionKey()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoGenKey'
&WSPrivateEncryptKey = GetEncryptionKey()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoGenKeyTOTP'
// TblTypeOTPGenerateCode.Visible = False
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'CheckRequiredFields'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True If &Name.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_Name'), DVMessageType.error, &Name.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Apple OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Facebook OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Google OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.WeChat OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest) AND &ClientId.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_ClientId'), DVMessageType.error, &ClientId.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Apple OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Facebook OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Google OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.WeChat OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest) AND &ClientSecret.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_ClientSecret'), DVMessageType.error, &ClientSecret.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Apple OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Facebook OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Google OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.WeChat OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote) AND &SiteURL.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_LocalSiteURL'), DVMessageType.error, &SiteURL.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote Or &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest) AND &GAMRServerURL.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_RemoteServerURL'), DVMessageType.error, &GAMRServerURL.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.ExternalWebService) AND &WSServerName.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_Servername'), DVMessageType.error, &WSServerName.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.ExternalWebService) AND &WSServerPort.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_Serverport'), DVMessageType.error, &WSServerPort.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.ExternalWebService) AND &WSName.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_WebServiceName'), DVMessageType.error, &WSName.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Custom) AND &CusFileName.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_FileName'), DVMessageType.error, &CusFileName.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Custom) AND &CusClassName.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','WWP_GAM_ClassName'), DVMessageType.error, &CusClassName.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If Not (Not &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMLocal) &Impersonate.Visible = False Impersonate_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &Impersonate.Visible = True Impersonate_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMLocal OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.ExternalWebService OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Custom) &TFAEnable.Visible = False TFAEnable_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &TFAEnable.Visible = True TFAEnable_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not ((&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMLocal OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.ExternalWebService OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Custom) And &TFAEnable) &TFAAuthenticationTypeName.Visible = False TFAAuthenticationTypeName_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &TFAAuthenticationTypeName.Visible = True TFAAuthenticationTypeName_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not ((&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMLocal OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.ExternalWebService OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Custom) And &TFAEnable) &TFAFirstFactorAuthenticationExpiration.Visible = False TFAFirstFactorAuthenticationExpiration_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &TFAFirstFactorAuthenticationExpiration.Visible = True TFAFirstFactorAuthenticationExpiration_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not ((&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMLocal OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.ExternalWebService OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Custom) And &TFAEnable) &TFAForceForAllUsers.Visible = False TFAForceForAllUsers_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &TFAForceForAllUsers.Visible = True TFAForceForAllUsers_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Apple OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Facebook OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Google OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.WeChat OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest) &ClientId.Visible = False ClientId_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &ClientId.Visible = True ClientId_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Apple OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Facebook OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Google OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.WeChat OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest) &ClientSecret.Visible = False ClientSecret_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &ClientSecret.Visible = True ClientSecret_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Apple OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Facebook OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Google OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.WeChat OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest) &VersionPath.Visible = False VersionPath_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &VersionPath.Visible = True VersionPath_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Apple OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Facebook OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Google OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.WeChat OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote) &SiteURL.Visible = False SiteURL_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &SiteURL.Visible = True SiteURL_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote) &SiteURLCallbackIsCustom.Visible = False SiteURLCallbackIsCustom_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &SiteURLCallbackIsCustom.Visible = True SiteURLCallbackIsCustom_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Twitter) &ConsumerKey.Visible = False ConsumerKey_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &ConsumerKey.Visible = True ConsumerKey_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Twitter) &ConsumerSecret.Visible = False ConsumerSecret_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &ConsumerSecret.Visible = True ConsumerSecret_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Twitter) &CallbackURL.Visible = False CallbackURL_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &CallbackURL.Visible = True CallbackURL_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote Or &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest) &AddUserAdditionalDataScope.Visible = False AddUserAdditionalDataScope_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &AddUserAdditionalDataScope.Visible = True AddUserAdditionalDataScope_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote Or &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest) &AddInitialPropertiesScope.Visible = False AddInitialPropertiesScope_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &AddInitialPropertiesScope.Visible = True AddInitialPropertiesScope_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Apple OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Facebook OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Google OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.WeChat OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest) &AdditionalScope.Visible = False AdditionalScope_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &AdditionalScope.Visible = True AdditionalScope_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest) &GAMRAuthenticationTypeName.Visible = False GAMRAuthenticationTypeName_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &GAMRAuthenticationTypeName.Visible = True GAMRAuthenticationTypeName_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Custom CusFileName_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' Else CusFileName_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Custom CusClassName_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' Else CusClassName_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.ExternalWebService WSServerName_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' Else WSServerName_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.ExternalWebService WSServerPort_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' Else WSServerPort_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.ExternalWebService WSName_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' Else WSName_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote Or &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest GAMRServerURL_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' Else GAMRServerURL_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote) &GAMRPrivateEncryptKey.Visible = False GAMRPrivateEncryptKey_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &GAMRPrivateEncryptKey.Visible = True GAMRPrivateEncryptKey_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote) &GAMRRepositoryGUID.Visible = False GAMRRepositoryGUID_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &GAMRRepositoryGUID.Visible = True GAMRRepositoryGUID_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.OTP And &OTPGenerationType = GAMOTPGenerationTypes.OTP_Custom) &OTPGenerationType_CustomEventGenerateCode.Visible = False OTPGenerationType_CustomEventGenerateCode_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &OTPGenerationType_CustomEventGenerateCode.Visible = True OTPGenerationType_CustomEventGenerateCode_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.OTP And &OTPGenerationType = GAMOTPGenerationTypes.OTP_GAM) &OTPAutogeneratedCodeLength.Visible = False OTPAutogeneratedCodeLength_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &OTPAutogeneratedCodeLength.Visible = True OTPAutogeneratedCodeLength_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.OTP And &OTPGenerationType = GAMOTPGenerationTypes.OTP_GAM) &OTPGenerateCodeOnlyNumbers.Visible = False OTPGenerateCodeOnlyNumbers_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &OTPGenerateCodeOnlyNumbers.Visible = True OTPGenerateCodeOnlyNumbers_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event Enter
Do 'CheckRequiredFields' If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult GAMRepository.ClearLastErrors() Do Case Case &Mode = TrnMode.Insert or &Mode = TrnMode.Update Do Case Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMLocal If &Mode = TrnMode.Update &AuthenticationTypeLocal.Load(&Name) Endif &AuthenticationTypeLocal.Name = &Name &AuthenticationTypeLocal.FunctionId = &FunctionId.ToString() &AuthenticationTypeLocal.IsEnable = &IsEnable &AuthenticationTypeLocal.Description = &Dsc &AuthenticationTypeLocal.SmallImageName = &SmallImageName &AuthenticationTypeLocal.BigImageName = &BigImageName &AuthenticationTypeLocal.TwoFactorAuthentication.Enable = &TFAEnable If &TFAEnable &AuthenticationTypeLocal.TwoFactorAuthentication.AuthenticationTypeName = &TFAAuthenticationTypeName.Trim() &AuthenticationTypeLocal.TwoFactorAuthentication.FirstAuthenticationFactorExpiration = &TFAFirstFactorAuthenticationExpiration &AuthenticationTypeLocal.TwoFactorAuthentication.ForceForAllUsers = &TFAForceForAllUsers Endif &AuthenticationTypeLocal.Save()
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Apple If &Mode = TrnMode.Update &AuthenticationTypeApple.Load(&Name) Endif &AuthenticationTypeApple.Name = &Name &AuthenticationTypeApple.IsEnable = &IsEnable &AuthenticationTypeApple.Description = &Dsc &AuthenticationTypeApple.SmallImageName = &SmallImageName &AuthenticationTypeApple.BigImageName = &BigImageName &AuthenticationTypeApple.Impersonate = &Impersonate &AuthenticationTypeApple.Apple.ClientId = &ClientId &AuthenticationTypeApple.Apple.ClientSecret = &ClientSecret &AuthenticationTypeApple.Apple.SiteURL = &SiteURL &AuthenticationTypeApple.Apple.AdditionalScope = &AdditionalScope &AuthenticationTypeApple.Save()
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Custom If &Mode = TrnMode.Update &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Load(&Name) Endif &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Name = &Name &AuthenticationTypeCustom.FunctionId = &FunctionId.ToString() &AuthenticationTypeCustom.IsEnable = &IsEnable &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Description = &Dsc &AuthenticationTypeCustom.SmallImageName = &SmallImageName &AuthenticationTypeCustom.BigImageName = &BigImageName &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Impersonate = &Impersonate &AuthenticationTypeCustom.TwoFactorAuthentication.Enable = &TFAEnable If &TFAEnable &AuthenticationTypeCustom.TwoFactorAuthentication.AuthenticationTypeName = &TFAAuthenticationTypeName &AuthenticationTypeCustom.TwoFactorAuthentication.FirstAuthenticationFactorExpiration = &TFAFirstFactorAuthenticationExpiration &AuthenticationTypeCustom.TwoFactorAuthentication.ForceForAllUsers = &TFAForceForAllUsers Endif &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Custom.Version = &CusVersion &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Custom.PrivateEncryptKey = &CusPrivateEncryptKey &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Custom.FileName = &CusFileName &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Custom.Package = &CusPackage &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Custom.ClassName = &CusClassName &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Save()
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.ExternalWebService If &Mode = TrnMode.Update &AuthenticationTypeWebService.Load(&Name) Endif &AuthenticationTypeWebService.Name = &Name &AuthenticationTypeWebService.FunctionId = &FunctionId.ToString() &AuthenticationTypeWebService.IsEnable = &IsEnable &AuthenticationTypeWebService.Description = &Dsc &AuthenticationTypeWebService.SmallImageName = &SmallImageName &AuthenticationTypeWebService.BigImageName = &BigImageName &AuthenticationTypeWebService.Impersonate = &Impersonate &AuthenticationTypeWebService.TwoFactorAuthentication.Enable= &TFAEnable If &TFAEnable &AuthenticationTypeWebService.TwoFactorAuthentication.AuthenticationTypeName = &TFAAuthenticationTypeName &AuthenticationTypeWebService.TwoFactorAuthentication.FirstAuthenticationFactorExpiration = &TFAFirstFactorAuthenticationExpiration &AuthenticationTypeWebService.TwoFactorAuthentication.ForceForAllUsers = &TFAForceForAllUsers Endif &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Version = &WSVersion &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.PrivateEncryptKey = &WSPrivateEncryptKey &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Timeout = &WSTimeout &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Package = &WSPackage &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Name = &WSName &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Extension = &WSExtension &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Server.Name = &WSServerName &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Server.Port = &WSServerPort &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Server.BaseURL = &WSServerBaseURL &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Server.SecureProtocol = &WSServerSecureProtocol &AuthenticationTypeWebService.Save()
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Facebook If &Mode = TrnMode.Update &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Load(&Name) Endif &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Name = &Name &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.IsEnable = &IsEnable &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Description = &Dsc &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.SmallImageName = &SmallImageName &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.BigImageName = &BigImageName &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Impersonate = &Impersonate &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Facebook.ClientId = &ClientId &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Facebook.ClientSecret = &ClientSecret &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Facebook.VersionPath = &VersionPath &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Facebook.SiteURL = &SiteURL &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Facebook.AdditionalScope= &AdditionalScope &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Save()
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote If &Mode = TrnMode.Update &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.Load(&Name) Endif &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.Name = &Name &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.FunctionId = &FunctionId.ToString() &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.IsEnable = &IsEnable &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.Description = &Dsc &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.SmallImageName = &SmallImageName &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.BigImageName = &BigImageName &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.Impersonate = &Impersonate &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.ClientId = &ClientId &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.ClientSecret = &ClientSecret &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.SiteURL = &SiteURL &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.SiteURLCallbackIsCustom = &SiteURLCallbackIsCustom &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.AddSessionInitialPropertiesScope = &AddInitialPropertiesScope &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.AddUserAdditionalDataScope = &AddUserAdditionalDataScope &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.AdditionalScope = &AdditionalScope &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.RemoteServerURL = &GAMRServerURL &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.RemoteServerKey = &GAMRPrivateEncryptKey &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.RemoteRepositoryGUID = &GAMRRepositoryGUID &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.AutovalidateExternalTokenAndRefresh = &AutovalidateExternalTokenAndRefresh &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.Save()
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest If &Mode = TrnMode.Update &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.Load(&Name) Endif &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.Name = &Name &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.FunctionId = &FunctionId.ToString() &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.IsEnable = &IsEnable &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.Description = &Dsc &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.SmallImageName = &SmallImageName &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.BigImageName = &BigImageName &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.Impersonate = &Impersonate &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.TwoFactorAuthentication.Enable = &TFAEnable If &TFAEnable &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.TwoFactorAuthentication.AuthenticationTypeName = &TFAAuthenticationTypeName &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.TwoFactorAuthentication.FirstAuthenticationFactorExpiration = &TFAFirstFactorAuthenticationExpiration &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.TwoFactorAuthentication.ForceForAllUsers = &TFAForceForAllUsers Endif &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.ClientId = &ClientId &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.ClientSecret = &ClientSecret &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.VersionPath = &VersionPath &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.AddSessionInitialPropertiesScope = &AddInitialPropertiesScope &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.AddUserAdditionalDataScope = &AddUserAdditionalDataScope &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.AdditionalScope = &AdditionalScope &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.RemoteAuthenticationTypeName = &GAMRAuthenticationTypeName &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.RemoteServerURL = &GAMRServerURL &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.RemoteServerKey = &GAMRPrivateEncryptKey &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.RemoteRepositoryGUID = &GAMRRepositoryGUID &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.AutovalidateExternalTokenAndRefresh = &AutovalidateExternalTokenAndRefresh &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.Save()
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Google If &Mode = TrnMode.Update &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Load(&Name) Endif &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Name = &Name &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.IsEnable = &IsEnable &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Description = &Dsc &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.SmallImageName = &SmallImageName &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.BigImageName = &BigImageName &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Impersonate = &Impersonate &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Google.ClientId = &ClientId &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Google.ClientSecret = &ClientSecret &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Google.VersionPath = &VersionPath &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Google.SiteURL = &SiteURL &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Google.AdditionalScope = &AdditionalScope &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Save()
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.OTP If &Mode = TrnMode.Update &AuthenticationTypeOTP.Load(&Name) Endif &AuthenticationTypeOTP.Name = &Name &AuthenticationTypeOTP.IsEnable = &IsEnable &AuthenticationTypeOTP.Description = &Dsc &AuthenticationTypeOTP.SmallImageName = &SmallImageName &AuthenticationTypeOTP.BigImageName = &BigImageNamE &AuthenticationTypeOTP.Impersonate = &Impersonate &AuthenticationTypeOTP.UseForFirstFactorAuthentication = &OTPUseForFirstFactorAuthentication &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.EventValidUser = &OTPEventValidateUser &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.GenerationType = &OTPGenerationType If &OTPGenerationType = GAMOTPGenerationTypes.OTP_Custom &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.GenerationType_CustomEventGenerateCode = &OTPGenerationType_CustomEventGenerateCode Else // If &OTPGenerationType = GAMOTPGenerationTypes.TOTP_Auth // &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.GenerationType_TOTPAuthenticatorIssuer = &OTPGEnerationType_TOTPAuthenticatorIssuer // &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.GenerationType_TOTPAuthenticatorSecretKey = &OTPGenerationType_TOTPAuthenticatorSecretKey // Endif Endif &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.CodeExpirationTimeout = &OTPCodeExpirationTimeout &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.MaximumDailyNumberCodes = &OTPMaximumDailyNumberCodes &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.AutogeneratedCodeLength = &OTPAutogeneratedCodeLength &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.GenerateCodeOnlyNumbers = &OTPGenerateCodeOnlyNumbers &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.NumberUnsuccessfulRetriesToLockOTP = &OTPNumberUnsuccessfulRetriesToLockOTP &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.NumberUnsuccessfulRetriesToBlockUserBasedOfOTPLocks = &OTPNumberUnsuccessfulRetriesToBlockUserBasedOfOTPLocks &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.AutomaticOTPUnlockTime = &OTPAutoUnlockTime &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.EventSendCode = &OTPEventSendCode &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.MailMessageSubject = &OTPMailMessageSubject &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.MailMessageBodyHTML = &OTPMailMessageBodyHTML &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.EventValidateCode = &OTPEventValidateCode &AuthenticationTypeOTP.Save()
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Twitter If &Mode = TrnMode.Update &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Load(&Name) Endif &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Name = &Name &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.IsEnable = &IsEnable &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Description = &Dsc &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.SmallImageName = &SmallImageName &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.BigImageName = &BigImageName &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Impersonate = &Impersonate &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Twitter.ConsumerKey = &ConsumerKey &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Twitter.ConsumerSecret = &ConsumerSecret &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Twitter.CallbackURL = &CallbackURL &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Twitter.AdditionalScope = &AdditionalScope &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Save()
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.WeChat If &Mode = TrnMode.Update &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.Load(&Name) Endif &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.Name = &Name &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.IsEnable = &IsEnable &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.Description = &Dsc &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.SmallImageName = &SmallImageName &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.BigImageName = &BigImageName &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.Impersonate = &Impersonate &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.WeChat.ClientId = &ClientId &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.WeChat.ClientSecret = &ClientSecret &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.WeChat.VersionPath = &VersionPath &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.WeChat.SiteURL = &SiteURL &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.WeChat.AdditionalScope = &AdditionalScope &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.Save() EndCase
Case &Mode = TrnMode.Delete Do Case Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMLocal &AuthenticationTypeLocal.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeLocal.Delete() Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Apple &AuthenticationTypeApple.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeApple.Delete() Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Custom &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Delete() Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.ExternalWebService &AuthenticationTypeWebService.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeWebService.Delete() Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Facebook &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Delete() Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.Delete() Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.Delete() Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Google &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Delete() Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Oauth20 &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Delete() Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.OTP &AuthenticationTypeOTP.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeOTP.Delete() Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Twitter &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Delete() Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.WeChat &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.Load(&Name) &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.Delete() EndCase EndCase
Do Case Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMLocal If &AuthenticationTypeLocal.Success() Commit Endif Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Apple If &AuthenticationTypeApple.Success() Commit Endif Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Custom If &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Success() Commit Endif Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.ExternalWebService If &AuthenticationTypeWebService.Success() Commit Endif Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Facebook If &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Success() Commit Endif Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote If &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.Success() Commit Endif Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest If &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.Success() Commit Endif Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Google If &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Success() Commit Endif Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Oauth20 If &AuthenticationTypeOauth20.Success() Commit Endif Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.OTP If &AuthenticationTypeOTP.Success() Commit Endif Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Twitter If &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Success() Commit Endif Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.WeChat If &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.Success() Commit Endif EndCase
&Errors = GAMRepository.GetLastErrors() If &Errors.Count = 0 GAMWWAuthTypes() Else For &Error in &Errors Msg(Format(!"%1 (GAM%2)", &Error.Message, &Error.Code)) EndFor Endif EndIf
EndEvent
Event &TFAEnable.Click
If &TFAEnable If &TFAFirstFactorAuthenticationExpiration.IsEmpty() &TFAFirstFactorAuthenticationExpiration = 900 Endif Do "GetListAuthenticationTypeOTP" Else &TFAAuthenticationTypeName.SetEmpty() Endif Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &OTPGenerationType.Click
Do Case Case &OTPGenerationType = GAMOTPGenerationTypes.OTP_GAM TblTOTPAuthenticator.Visible = False Case &OTPGenerationType = GAMOTPGenerationTypes.OTP_Custom TblTOTPAuthenticator.Visible = False Do "GetEventListGenerateCode" // Case &OTPGenerationType = GAMOTPGenerationTypes.TOTP_Auth // TblTOTPAuthenticator.Visible = True // TblOTPCustom.Visible = False // TblTypeOTPGenerateCode.Visible = False Endcase Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Sub "RefreshAuthenticationType"
&SiteURL.Visible = True TBLServerHost.Visible = False TblWebService.Visible = False TblExternal.Visible = False
TblOTPAuthentication.Visible = False TblTOTPAuthenticator.Visible = False TblOTPConfiguration.Visible = False
If &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Apple OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Facebook OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Google OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.OTP OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.WeChat OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Twitter &FunctionId = GAMAuthenticationFunctions.OnlyAuthentication &FunctionId.Enabled = False Else &FunctionId.Enabled = True Endif
Do Case Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMLocal Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Apple OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Facebook OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Google OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.WeChat OR &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote If &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.WeChat &VersionPath.Visible = False Endif If &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemote &VersionPath.Visible = False TBLServerHost.Visible = True Endif Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.GAMRemoteRest TBLServerHost.Visible = True
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.OTP TblOTPAuthentication.Visible = True TblOTPConfiguration.Visible = True Do Case Case &OTPGenerationType = GAMOTPGenerationTypes.OTP_GAM TblTOTPAuthenticator.Visible = False Case &OTPGenerationType = GAMOTPGenerationTypes.OTP_Custom Do "GetEventListGenerateCode" // Case &OTPGenerationType = GAMOTPGenerationTypes.TOTP_Auth // TblTOTPAuthenticator.Visible = True // TblTypeOTPGenerateCode.Visible = False Endcase
Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Twitter &FunctionId = GAMAuthenticationFunctions.OnlyAuthentication &FunctionId.Enabled = False Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.ExternalWebService TblWebService.Visible = True Case &TypeId = GAMAuthenticationTypes.Custom TblExternal.Visible = True EndCase Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndSub
Sub "GetListAuthenticationTypeImpersonate"
For &AuthenticationType in GAMRepository.GetAuthenticationTypes(&GAMAuthenticationTypeFilter, &Errors) If &AuthenticationType.Name <> &Name AND &AuthenticationType.TypeId <> GAMAuthenticationTypes.OTP &Impersonate.AddItem(&AuthenticationType.Name, &AuthenticationType.Name) Endif Endfor
EndSub
Sub "GetListAuthenticationTypeOTP"
&GAMAuthenticationTypeFilter.Type = GAMAuthenticationTypes.OTP For &AuthenticationType in GAMRepository.GetAuthenticationTypes(&GAMAuthenticationTypeFilter, &Errors) &TFAAuthenticationTypeName.AddItem(&AuthenticationType.Name, &AuthenticationType.Description) Endfor
EndSub
Sub "GetEventListValidateUser"
&GAMEventSubscriptionFilter.Event = GAMEvents.User_OneTimePasswordValidateUser For &EventSuscription in GAMRepository.GetEventSubscriptions(&GAMEventSubscriptionFilter, &Errors) &OTPEventValidateUser.AddItem(&EventSuscription.Id, &EventSuscription.Description) Endfor
EndSub
Sub "GetEventListGenerateCode"
&GAMEventSubscriptionFilter.Event = GAMEvents.User_OneTimePasswordGenerateCode For &EventSuscription in GAMRepository.GetEventSubscriptions(&GAMEventSubscriptionFilter, &Errors) &OTPGenerationType_CustomEventGenerateCode.AddItem(&EventSuscription.Id, &EventSuscription.Description) Endfor
EndSub
Sub "GetEventListSendCode"
&GAMEventSubscriptionFilter.Event = GAMEvents.User_OneTimePasswordSendCode For &EventSuscription in GAMRepository.GetEventSubscriptions(&GAMEventSubscriptionFilter, &Errors) &OTPEventSendCode.AddItem(&EventSuscription.Id, &EventSuscription.Description) Endfor
EndSub
Sub "GetEventListValidateCode"
&GAMEventSubscriptionFilter.Event = GAMEvents.User_OneTimePasswordValidateCode For &EventSuscription in GAMRepository.GetEventSubscriptions(&GAMEventSubscriptionFilter, &Errors) &OTPEventValidateCode.AddItem(&EventSuscription.Id, &EventSuscription.Description) Endfor
EndSub
Sub "InitAuthenticationTypeApple"
Do "GetListAuthenticationTypeImpersonate" &FunctionId.Enabled = False &AuthenticationTypeApple.Load(&Name) &Name = &AuthenticationTypeApple.Name &IsEnable = &AuthenticationTypeApple.IsEnable &Dsc = &AuthenticationTypeApple.Description &SmallImageName = &AuthenticationTypeApple.SmallImageName &BigImageName = &AuthenticationTypeApple.BigImageName &Impersonate = &AuthenticationTypeApple.Impersonate &ClientId = &AuthenticationTypeApple.Apple.ClientId &ClientSecret = &AuthenticationTypeApple.Apple.ClientSecret &SiteURL = &AuthenticationTypeApple.Apple.SiteURL &AdditionalScope = &AuthenticationTypeApple.Apple.AdditionalScope
EndSub
Sub "InitAuthenticationTypeCustom"
Do "GetListAuthenticationTypeImpersonate" Do "GetListAuthenticationTypeOTP" &FunctionId.Enabled = True &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Load(&Name) &Name = &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Name &FunctionId = GAMAuthenticationFunctions.Convert(&AuthenticationTypeCustom.FunctionId) &IsEnable = &AuthenticationTypeCustom.IsEnable &Dsc = &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Description &SmallImageName = &AuthenticationTypeCustom.SmallImageName &BigImageName = &AuthenticationTypeCustom.BigImageName &Impersonate = &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Impersonate &TFAEnable = &AuthenticationTypeCustom.TwoFactorAuthentication.Enable If &TFAEnable &TFAAuthenticationTypeName = &AuthenticationTypeCustom.TwoFactorAuthentication.AuthenticationTypeName &TFAFirstFactorAuthenticationExpiration = &AuthenticationTypeCustom.TwoFactorAuthentication.FirstAuthenticationFactorExpiration &TFAForceForAllUsers = &AuthenticationTypeCustom.TwoFactorAuthentication.ForceForAllUsers Endif &CusVersion = &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Custom.Version &CusPrivateEncryptKey = &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Custom.PrivateEncryptKey &CusFileName = &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Custom.FileName &CusPackage = &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Custom.Package &CusClassName = &AuthenticationTypeCustom.Custom.ClassName
EndSub
Sub "InitAuthenticationTypeExternalWebService"
Do "GetListAuthenticationTypeImpersonate" Do "GetListAuthenticationTypeOTP" &FunctionId.Enabled = True &AuthenticationTypeWebService.Load(&Name) &Name = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.Name &FunctionId = GAMAuthenticationFunctions.Convert(&AuthenticationTypeWebService.FunctionId) &IsEnable = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.IsEnable &Dsc = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.Description &SmallImageName = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.SmallImageName &BigImageName = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.BigImageName &Impersonate = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.Impersonate &TFAEnable = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.TwoFactorAuthentication.Enable If &TFAEnable &TFAAuthenticationTypeName = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.TwoFactorAuthentication.AuthenticationTypeName &TFAFirstFactorAuthenticationExpiration = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.TwoFactorAuthentication.FirstAuthenticationFactorExpiration &TFAForceForAllUsers = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.TwoFactorAuthentication.ForceForAllUsers Endif &WSVersion = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Version &WSPrivateEncryptKey = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.PrivateEncryptKey &WSServerName = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Server.Name &WSServerPort = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Server.Port &WSServerBaseURL = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Server.BaseURL &WSServerSecureProtocol = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Server.SecureProtocol &WSTimeout = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Timeout &WSPackage = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Package &WSName = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Name &WSExtension = &AuthenticationTypeWebService.WebService.Extension
EndSub
Sub "InitAuthenticationTypeFacebook"
Do "GetListAuthenticationTypeImpersonate" &FunctionId.Enabled = False &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Load(&Name) &Name = &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Name &IsEnable = &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.IsEnable &Dsc = &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Description &SmallImageName = &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.SmallImageName &BigImageName = &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.BigImageName &Impersonate = &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Impersonate &ClientId = &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Facebook.ClientId &ClientSecret = &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Facebook.ClientSecret &VersionPath = &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Facebook.VersionPath &SiteURL = &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Facebook.SiteURL &AdditionalScope = &AuthenticationTypeFacebook.Facebook.AdditionalScope
EndSub
Sub "InitAuthenticationTypeGAMLocal"
Do "GetListAuthenticationTypeOTP" &AuthenticationTypeLocal.Load(&Name) &Name = &AuthenticationTypeLocal.Name &FunctionId = GAMAuthenticationFunctions.Convert(&AuthenticationTypeLocal.FunctionId) &IsEnable = &AuthenticationTypeLocal.IsEnable &Dsc = &AuthenticationTypeLocal.Description &SmallImageName = &AuthenticationTypeLocal.SmallImageName &BigImageName = &AuthenticationTypeLocal.BigImageName &TFAEnable = &AuthenticationTypeLocal.TwoFactorAuthentication.Enable If &TFAEnable &TFAAuthenticationTypeName = &AuthenticationTypeLocal.TwoFactorAuthentication.AuthenticationTypeName &TFAFirstFactorAuthenticationExpiration = &AuthenticationTypeLocal.TwoFactorAuthentication.FirstAuthenticationFactorExpiration &TFAForceForAllUsers = &AuthenticationTypeLocal.TwoFactorAuthentication.ForceForAllUsers Endif
EndSub
Sub "InitAuthenticationTypeGAMRemote"
Do "GetListAuthenticationTypeImpersonate" &FunctionId.Enabled = True &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.Load(&Name) &Name = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.Name &FunctionId = GAMAuthenticationFunctions.Convert(&AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.FunctionId) &IsEnable = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.IsEnable &Dsc = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.Description &SmallImageName = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.SmallImageName &BigImageName = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.BigImageName &Impersonate = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.Impersonate &ClientId = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.ClientId &ClientSecret = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.ClientSecret &SiteURL = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.SiteURL &SiteURLCallbackIsCustom = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.SiteURLCallbackIsCustom &AddInitialPropertiesScope = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.AddSessionInitialPropertiesScope &AddUserAdditionalDataScope = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.AddUserAdditionalDataScope &AdditionalScope = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.AdditionalScope &GAMRServerURL = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.RemoteServerURL &GAMRPrivateEncryptKey = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.RemoteServerKey &GAMRRepositoryGUID = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.RemoteRepositoryGUID &AutovalidateExternalTokenAndRefresh = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemote.GAMRemote.AutovalidateExternalTokenAndRefresh
EndSub
Sub "InitAuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest"
Do "GetListAuthenticationTypeImpersonate" Do "GetListAuthenticationTypeOTP" &FunctionId.Enabled = True &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.Load(&Name) &Name = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.Name &FunctionId = GAMAuthenticationFunctions.Convert(&AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.FunctionId) &IsEnable = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.IsEnable &Dsc = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.Description &SmallImageName = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.SmallImageName &BigImageName = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.BigImageName &Impersonate = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.Impersonate &TFAEnable = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.TwoFactorAuthentication.Enable If &TFAEnable &TFAAuthenticationTypeName = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.TwoFactorAuthentication.AuthenticationTypeName &TFAFirstFactorAuthenticationExpiration = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.TwoFactorAuthentication.FirstAuthenticationFactorExpiration &TFAForceForAllUsers = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.TwoFactorAuthentication.ForceForAllUsers Endif &ClientId = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.ClientId &ClientSecret = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.ClientSecret &VersionPath = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.VersionPath &AddInitialPropertiesScope = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.AddSessionInitialPropertiesScope &AddUserAdditionalDataScope = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.AddUserAdditionalDataScope &AdditionalScope = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.AdditionalScope &GAMRAuthenticationTypeName = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.RemoteAuthenticationTypeName &GAMRServerURL = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.RemoteServerURL &GAMRPrivateEncryptKey = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.RemoteServerKey &GAMRRepositoryGUID = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.RemoteRepositoryGUID &AutovalidateExternalTokenAndRefresh = &AuthenticationTypeGAMRemoteRest.GAMRemoteRest.AutovalidateExternalTokenAndRefresh
EndSub
Sub "InitAuthenticationTypeGoogle"
Do "GetListAuthenticationTypeImpersonate" &FunctionId.Enabled = False &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Load(&Name) &Name = &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Name &IsEnable = &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.IsEnable &Dsc = &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Description &SmallImageName = &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.SmallImageName &BigImageName = &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.BigImageName &Impersonate = &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Impersonate &ClientId = &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Google.ClientId &ClientSecret = &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Google.ClientSecret &VersionPath = &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Google.VersionPath &SiteURL = &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Google.SiteURL &AdditionalScope = &AuthenticationTypeGoogle.Google.AdditionalScope
EndSub
Sub "InitAuthenticationTypeOTP"
Do "GetListAuthenticationTypeImpersonate" Do "GetEventListValidateUser" Do "GetEventListSendCode" Do "GetEventListValidateCode" &FunctionId.Enabled = False &FunctionId = GAMAuthenticationFunctions.OnlyAuthentication &AuthenticationTypeOTP.Load(&Name) &Name = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.Name &IsEnable = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.IsEnable &Dsc = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.Description &SmallImageName = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.SmallImageName &BigImageName = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.BigImageName &Impersonate = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.Impersonate &OTPUseForFirstFactorAuthentication = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.UseForFirstFactorAuthentication &OTPEventValidateUser = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.EventValidUser &OTPGenerationType = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.GenerationType &OTPGenerationType_CustomEventGenerateCode = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.GenerationType_CustomEventGenerateCode
// &OTPGenerationType_TOTPAuthenticatorSecretKey = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.GenerationType_TOTPAuthenticatorSecretKey &OTPCodeExpirationTimeout = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.CodeExpirationTimeout &OTPMaximumDailyNumberCodes = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.MaximumDailyNumberCodes &OTPAutogeneratedCodeLength = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.AutogeneratedCodeLength &OTPGenerateCodeOnlyNumbers = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.GenerateCodeOnlyNumbers &OTPNumberUnsuccessfulRetriesToLockOTP = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.NumberUnsuccessfulRetriesToLockOTP &OTPNumberUnsuccessfulRetriesToBlockUserBasedOfOTPLocks = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.NumberUnsuccessfulRetriesToBlockUserBasedOfOTPLocks &OTPAutoUnlockTime = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.AutomaticOTPUnlockTime &OTPEventSendCode = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.EventSendCode &OTPMailMessageSubject = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.MailMessageSubject &OTPMailMessageBodyHTML = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.MailMessageBodyHTML &OTPEventValidateCode = &AuthenticationTypeOTP.OTP.EventValidateCode
EndSub
Sub "InitAuthenticationTypeTwitter"
Do "GetListAuthenticationTypeImpersonate" &FunctionId.Enabled = False &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Load(&Name) &Name = &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Name &IsEnable = &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.IsEnable &Dsc = &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Description &SmallImageName = &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.SmallImageName &BigImageName = &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.BigImageName &Impersonate = &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Impersonate &ConsumerKey = &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Twitter.ConsumerKey &ConsumerSecret = &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Twitter.ConsumerSecret &CallbackURL = &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Twitter.CallbackURL &AdditionalScope = &AuthenticationTypeTwitter.Twitter.AdditionalScope
EndSub
Sub "InitAuthenticationTypeWeChat"
Do "GetListAuthenticationTypeImpersonate" &FunctionId.Enabled = False &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.Load(&Name) &Name = &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.Name &IsEnable = &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.IsEnable &Dsc = &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.Description &SmallImageName = &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.SmallImageName &BigImageName = &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.BigImageName &Impersonate = &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.Impersonate &ClientId = &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.WeChat.ClientId &ClientSecret = &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.WeChat.ClientSecret &VersionPath = &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.WeChat.VersionPath &SiteURL = &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.WeChat.SiteURL &AdditionalScope = &AuthenticationTypeWeChat.WeChat.AdditionalScope
EndSub

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Automatically validate external token expiration and use the refresh token to get a new one

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Number of unsuccessful retries to block user based on number of OTP locks

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Number of unsuccessful retries to block the OTP
